options.a: the RPM of the AC generator and the RPM of the DC generator, and adjusts any differences in their rotational speeds accordingly to make them compatible.
options.b: the engine-side RPM and the rotational speed of the generator rotor and adjusts the difference in rotational speed accordingly.
options.c: the voltage of the AC bus and the voltage of the DC bus and adjusts the difference in potential accordingly.
options.d: engine N1 and engine N2 rotational speeds, and adjusts the speeds accordingly for most efficient operation.
